summary: DHH notes that the December 2004 issue of the German Linux-Magazin features an article about web applications with Ruby and Rails. He mentions being interviewed for the piece and speculates the interview may be included. He asks German Rails community members to scan and share the article, believing it to be the first print mention of Ruby on Rails, with more publications forthcoming.
key_points: German Linux-Magazin published what DHH believes is the first print article about Ruby on Rails
DHH was interviewed by the magazine's writer for the piece
He solicits help from the German Rails community to obtain a copy of the article
More print coverage of Rails was already in the pipeline at this early stage
money_quotes: I believe this is the first print mentioning of Ruby on Rails.
A few more are in the pipeline.
key_insight: This brief 2004 post captures a milestone moment in Rails history — its first appearance in print media — showing how the framework was just beginning to gain mainstream attention.
